mapper.select:
SELECT t1.id, t1.class_id, t1.title, t1.content, t1.creator, t1.add_time, t2.name as teacher_name, t3.name as class_name, COUNT(t4.id) as complete_count
, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM homework_record WHERE homework_id = t1.id AND student_id = #{studentId}) > 0 as completed
FROM homework t1 LEFT JOIN class t3 ON t3.id = t1.class_id LEFT JOIN staff t2 ON t2.id = t1.creator LEFT JOIN homework_record t4 ON t4.homework_id = t1.id WHERE t1.deleted = 0
AND t1.class_id = #{query.classId}
AND t1.creator = #{query.teacherId}
AND t1.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.title}, '%')
GROUP BY t1.id ORDER BY t1.id DESC

SELECT t1.id, t1.class_id, t1.title, t1.content, t1.creator, t1.add_time, t2.name as teacher_name, t3.name as class_name, (SELECT COUNT(0) FROM homework_record WHERE homework_id = t1.id) as complete_count, t4.id as rid, t4.homework_id as r_homework_id, t4.student_id as r_student_id, t4.add_time as r_add_time, t4.content as r_content, t4.score as r_score, t4.comment as r_comment, t4.comment_time as r_comment_time, t4.images as r_images, t5.name as student_name, t6.name as comment_teacher_name FROM homework t1 LEFT JOIN class t3 ON t3.id = t1.class_id LEFT JOIN staff t2 ON t2.id = t1.creator LEFT JOIN homework_record t4 ON t4.homework_id = t1.id LEFT JOIN student t5 ON t5.id = t4.student_id LEFT JOIN staff t6 ON t6.id = t4.comment_teacher WHERE t1.id = #{id} AND t1.deleted = 0
